name: meta-prompt-skills
description: A flat collection of standalone meta-prompt skills, each a cleaned port of a battle-tested community prompt plus an original prompt-improver. Ships humanizer, video-distill, sota-scan, session-mine, clarify-deep, book-to-skill, and prompt-improver.

interface.shortDescription: Standalone prompt and writing utility skills.
interface.longDescription: Use meta-prompt-skills for focused prompt and writing workflows: humanizing drafts, distilling videos, scanning against top peers, mining recurring session corrections, clarifying before a build, turning books into skills, and improving existing prompts or skills.
defaultPrompt: Turn this video into structured notes.
